_docs: Edit this file to define which services to enable for this client installation.
_usage: Primary installer input. Linux and Windows installers read this file for client values, optional profiles, and tunnel defaults. Restricted admin routes require explicit acknowledgement via security.allow_restricted_admin_tunnel_routes.

core._comment: Baseline core services remain required and always-on for TT-Core installs.

routes._comment: Public-capable routes defined by config/service-catalog.json. Restricted admin routes remain disabled by default and require security.allow_restricted_admin_tunnel_routes=true.

tunnel._token_note: CF_TUNNEL_TOKEN must be set in compose/tt-tunnel/.env only. Never store tokens in this file.

security.notes: Leave false for normal production use. Set true only if you intentionally expose restricted admin surfaces like pgAdmin, Portainer, or OpenClaw behind strong Cloudflare Access controls.
